MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, John Stewart Comapny is present. Represented by Serge Bokoff.
Attorney, Francisco Torres, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Michael Cook, is present.
Attorney, Catherine Danielson, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Philip Keith, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUL-12-2010 is vacated.
